ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the security */,
  "exchange" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the security is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the economy that the security belongs to */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number for unique identification */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the security information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security associated with the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "adj_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price */,
  "adj_high" REAL /* Adjusted highest price of the day */,
  "adj_low" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price of the day */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "adj_volume" TEXT /* Adjusted trading volume */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount for the day */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Stock split ratio for the day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of account creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, compliance) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of report creation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security being traded */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price for the session */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price for the session */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the session */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the session */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume for the session */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed during the session */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trading session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange operates */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the exchange's official website */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone in which the exchange operates */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of role creation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
